input.command:
S=~/Library/Application\ Support/LaunchCat/coh/settings
echo "=== is PID 30060 (from launcher.running) still alive? ==="
ps -p 30060 -o pid,command 2>/dev/null && echo "  ^ ALIVE — do NOT remove lock" || echo "  ✅ PID 30060 is DEAD — this is a stale lock from our wineserver -k"
echo
echo "=== removing stale launcher.running lock ==="
if ! ps -p 30060 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  rm -f "$S/launcher/launcher.running" && echo "  removed stale launcher.running (held dead PID 30060)"
else
  echo "  skipped — PID alive"
fi
echo
echo "=== confirm gone ==="
ls -la "$S/launcher/launcher.running" 2>/dev/null && echo "still there" || echo "  ✅ lock cleared — LaunchCat will start clean next time"
echo
echo "=== display context (for resolution advice) ==="
system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'resolution|display type|retina|radeon|vram|framebuffer' | head -12
input.description: Verify dead PID, remove stale lock, get display info
